THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LADEZMAN, ARTHUR THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2566 38TH AVENUE ROOM #6 SAN FRANCISCO, CA., LEASE FORFEITED, IF DEFT. FAILS TO VACATE BY 6/8/99 7:00 P.M. PLTF. HAS AMEND ED JDGMT FOR $1,500.00 P.D.R. AND $12.50 PER DIEM FROM 5/1/ THROUGH 6/8/99 WITH COST OF $201. FOR TOTAL AMENDED JDGMT. OF $3,013.50. DEFT. TO RETURN KEYS AND LEAVE PREM. BROOM CLEAN. GENERAL WAIVER OF CLAIMS. SEC. DEP. FORFEIT. TO PLTF.

C/C FOR SETTLEMENT CONF. IN ROOM #503B. ROBERT SCHUCHARDT, PRO TEM. D. CARTER, CLERK. NO REPORTER. PRESENT: ARNOLD W. EVJE II FOR PLTF. ALSO PRESENT ARTHUR LADEZMAN WITH FRIEND, IGOR KOPELMAN, TO ASSIST IN TRANSLATION OF RUSSIAN TO ENGLISH. PLTF. ROSA KIOS, ON TELEPHONE STANDBY. CASE SETTLED BY STIPULATED JDGMT. APPROVED AS TO FORM AND CONTENT. SEE CLERK MINUTES AND WRITTEN JDGMT.
